project.title: Enigma-Research-Registry-Index
project.scenario: Research-data timestamping & integrity proof — prove a dataset existed unaltered at time T.

tasks.title: Plan Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria and a sequence diagram for the Publisher Registration slice.

tasks.title: Design Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: Specify contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol — functions (registerPublisher, deregisterPublisher, transferCurator), events, errors, storage layout.

tasks.title: Code Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: Implement registerPublisher, deregisterPublisher, transferCurator in contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol (clear the TODO(member1) markers).

tasks.title: Compile
tasks.desc: `forge build` is green including the Publisher Registration slice.

tasks.title: Revise after review
tasks.desc: Address PR review feedback; refactor contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol and tests.

tasks.title: Deploy Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: Deploy via script/Deploy.s.sol to Anvil (then Sepolia); record addresses in config.js.

tasks.title: Test Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: `forge test --match-contract IssuerRegistryTest` passes; add edge-case + event tests.

tasks.title: Document Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: Write docs/issuer-module.md and fill your README contribution row.

tasks.title: Present Publisher Registration
tasks.desc: Record a demo video + slide deck and link them under Deliverables.
